title: × pityromeria longipes
intro: × Pityrogramma longipes, also known as the Long-tailed fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The Long-tailed fern has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
